name.description: The name of the topic. Topic names must be made up of only uppercase and lowercase ASCII letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens, and must be between 1 and 256 characters long. For a FIFO (first-in-first-out) topic, the name must end with the '.fifo' suffix. If omitted, Terraform will assign a random, unique name.

display_name.description: The display name for the topic.

fifo_topic.description: Boolean indicating whether or not to create a FIFO (first-in-first-out) topic (default is false).

signature_version.description: If SignatureVersion should be 1 (SHA1) or 2 (SHA256). The signature version corresponds to the hashing algorithm used while creating the signature of the notifications, subscription confirmations, or unsubscribe confirmation messages sent by Amazon SNS.

content_based_deduplication.description: Enables content-based deduplication for FIFO topics.

application_failure_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive failure feedback for this topic.

application_success_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive success feedback for this topic.

firehose_failure_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive failure feedback for this topic.

firehose_success_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive success feedback for this topic.

http_failure_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive failure feedback for this topic.

http_success_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive success feedback for this topic.

lambda_failure_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive failure feedback for this topic.

lambda_success_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive success feedback for this topic.

sqs_failure_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive failure feedback for this topic.

sqs_success_feedback_role_arn.description: The IAM role permitted to receive success feedback for this topic.

tracing_config.description: Tracing mode of an Amazon SNS topic.

kms_master_key_id.description: The ID of an AWS-managed customer master key (CMK) for Amazon SNS or a custom CMK.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.
